title: Prohibition on spread pricing; effective rate pricing; fees
doc_html:
§1867. Prohibition on spread pricing; effective rate pricing; fees

            A. A pharmacy benefit manager is prohibited from conducting or participating in spread pricing in this state.

            B. A pharmacy benefit manager is prohibited from using effective rate pricing for a local pharmacy.

            C. A health insurance issuer or a pharmacy benefit manager shall not directly or indirectly charge or hold a pharmacist or pharmacy responsible for any fee.

            D. Any violation of this Section that is committed or performed with such frequency as to indicate a general business practice shall be subject to the provisions of the Unfair Trade Practices and Consumer Protection Law, R.S. 51:1401 et seq., as provided in R.S. 40:2870(B).

            Acts 2019, No. 124, §1, eff. July 1, 2020; Acts 2025, No. 474, §1, eff. June 20, 2025.
doc_text:
§1867.  Prohibition on spread pricing; effective rate pricing; fees
A.  A pharmacy benefit manager is prohibited from conducting or participating in
spread pricing in this state.
B.  A pharmacy benefit manager is prohibited from using effective rate pricing for
a local pharmacy.
C.  A health insurance issuer or a pharmacy benefit manager shall not directly or
indirectly charge or hold a pharmacist or pharmacy responsible for any fee.
D. Any violation of this Section that is committed or performed with such frequency
as to indicate a general business practice shall be subject to the provisions of the Unfair
Trade Practices and Consumer Protection Law, R.S. 51:1401 et seq., as provided in R.S.
40:2870(B).
Acts 2019, No. 124, §1, eff. July 1, 2020; Acts 2025, No. 474, §1, eff. June 20, 2025.
